claim_support.reason: Most claims are supported by cited chunks, but the key growth claim (6.32% YoY) is contradicted by the underlying revenue values in the evidence (15.95B vs 13.07B implies ~22% YoY, not 6.32%). The calculation chunk provided supports the 6.32% figure but mislabels sequential growth as YoY, leading to unsupported material conclusion.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical error: Q3 2025 Revenue YoY growth is stated as 6.32% based on Q3 2024 revenue of $13.07B. The actual YoY growth based on provided figures is ~22%. The 6.32% figure corresponds to Sequential growth (Q3 vs Q2), misrepresenting the growth metric materially.

citation_precision.reason: Authoritative cited chunk IDs correctly map to the provided evidence text for each paragraph. No mismatches found between IDs and evidence content.

temporal_validity.reason: Report as-of date (2025-09-15) aligns with evidence source dates (2025-09-15) and financial periods (Q3 2025). No post-as-of claims detected.

consistency.reason: Internal contradiction on employee count: Company Overview Para 1 states 37,000 employees, while Para 2 states 19,000 employees. Both are cited to different chunks, creating a factual inconsistency within the report.
